title: Congruence-simple semirings without nilpotent elements
author_string: Kepka, Tomáš, Korbelář, Miroslav, Landsmann, Günter
journal: Journal of Algebra and Its Applications
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Ltd
abstract: In this paper, we provide a classification of congruence-simple semirings with a multiplicatively absorbing element and without nontrivial nilpotent elements.
